title: Supreme Court extends tenures of tribunal members; Centre says it will table new tribunal law
description: The Supreme Court on Monday permitted the Union government to extend the tenure of chairpersons and members of various tribunals, who are due to retire shortly, till September 8.A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi passed the order after the Centre informed the Court that it is working on a fresh law governing tribunals and the same may be introduced in parliament during the upcoming monsoon session.However, even as it passed such an order, the Court exp
